---
title: My PDF report
author: James Goldie
format: typst
---

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
#| echo: false
#| output: false
x = "bill_length_mm"
kind = "kde"
```

Hello world! Here's a sample chart made in Seaborn:

```{python}
import seaborn as sns
penguins = sns.load_dataset("penguins")
sns.displot(
  data=penguins, hue="species", multiple="stack",
  x=x, kind=kind)
```

**Variable:** `{python} x`

**Distribution:** `{python} kind`
